_comment: Cadence governor rate dials. The feed RAMPS as the audience grows — raise the quotas (or set ramp.weekly_increment) from the Monday review. Conservative defaults: 1 clip/day/source, hard ceilings, 75-min stagger.
_sources_note: Which sources autopilot publishes. Add 'daily' to start draining the standalone-clip backlog. Podcast clips and daily clips get independent daily quotas.
_quota_note: Clips approved per day per source. One clip fans out to its eligible spillover platforms. This is the main throughput dial — raise it as the audience builds.
_ramp_note: Auto-grow: effective quota = base + floor(weeks_since_start * weekly_increment), capped at max. Default increment 0 = manual control. Set to e.g. 1 to add one clip/day/source each week up to the cap.
_cap_note: Hard ceiling per platform per day — a safety net so no single channel ever floods regardless of quota.
_stagger_note: Minimum gap between approvals so clips never fire same-minute (anti-bot-blast). Combined with a frequent cron, this spaces the feed naturally across the day.
_priority_note: playbook = bandit exploit: bias release toward format x topic the ledger shows winning (reads content-playbook.md); falls back to score then oldest. Alternatives: 'score_then_oldest', 'oldest' (FIFO), 'newest'.
